nasb.text: And what one nation in the earth is like Your people Israel, whom God went to redeem for Himself as a people, to make You a name by great and terrible things, in driving out nations from before Your people, whom You redeemed out of Egypt?

esv.text: And who is like your people Israel, the one nation on earth whom God went to redeem to be his people, making for yourself a name for great and awesome things, in driving out nations before your people whom you redeemed from Egypt?

cnv.text: 世上有哪一個國能比得上你的子民以色列呢？　神親自把他們救贖出來，作自己的子民，又在你從埃及所救贖出來的子民面前驅逐列國，以大而可畏的事建立自己的名。

ccb.text: 世上有谁能与你的以色列子民相比？你从埃及救赎他们，让他们做你的子民，为他们驱逐外族人、行伟大奇妙的事，使自己声名远播。
